## IDENTITY

**Name:** Arjunagi A. Rehman
**Role:** Backend & AI Systems Engineer, Lead Project Engineer

## SKILLS & TECHNOLOGY STACK

### Languages
Go, Java, Python, Node.js, TypeScript, SQL, Shell scripting

### Frameworks & Libraries
Spring Boot, Gin, Flask, FastAPI, Express, React, React Native, GraphQL

### Cloud & Infrastructure
**AWS:** ECS (Fargate), EKS, CDK, Lambda, IoT Core, Rekognition, S3, DynamoDB, Bedrock, Cognito, API Gateway
**Azure:** Azure AI Foundry, Azure AI Search, Azure Entra ID (Microsoft Identity)
**Other:** Docker, Terraform, PostgreSQL, Redis (Pub/Sub), MongoDB, Apache Kafka

### AI & Agent Technologies
Google Agent Development Kit (ADK), LangGraph, AWS Bedrock agents, Azure AI Foundry, Qdrant (vector database), RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), OpenRouter, Gemini Flash, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1-nano

### DevOps & Tooling
GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, SSE (Server-Sent Events), BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy)

---

## PRODUCTION PROJECTS (DETAILED)

### 1. Kalrav.AI — No-Code AI Agent Platform
**Live URL:** https://kalrav.ai/
**Portfolio page:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/projects/kalrav
**Status:** Live in production, 10+ enterprise customers
**Languages supported:** 10+

**What it does:**
Kalrav.AI is a no-code platform that lets businesses deploy AI-powered chatbots on their e-commerce stores without writing code. It serves live stores with real customer traffic and integrates with existing CRM systems.

**Key features:**
- Multi-tenant SaaS architecture — each customer gets isolated AI agent configuration
- WordPress plugin for easy site embedding
- Shopify app for e-commerce integration
- NPM package (@irisidea/kalrav-ai) for custom web integrations
- CRM integrations: Zoho CRM and Salesforce
- Supports 10+ human languages for global deployments
- Powered by Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) backend

**Tech stack:** Google ADK, FastAPI, Node.js, multi-tenant architecture, LLM APIs

---

### 2. RouteEye — Real-time Fleet Management Platform
**Live URL:** https://routeeye.io/
**Portfolio page:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/projects/routeeye
**Status:** Live at BIAL (Kempegowda International Airport Bangalore)
**Telemetry interval:** Every 5 seconds

**What it does:**
RouteEye is a fleet management and tracking platform deployed for staff shuttle operations at Bangalore International Airport. It provides real-time GPS tracking and route management for airport shuttle fleets.

**Key features:**
- Real-time GPS telemetry via AWS IoT Core (5-second intervals)
- Server-Sent Events (SSE) for live location streaming to dashboards
- Microservices backend architecture in Go
- Redis Pub/Sub for internal event broadcasting
- PostgreSQL for persistent trip and fleet data
- AWS Lambda for event processing

**Tech stack:** Go (Gin), AWS IoT Core, AWS Lambda, Redis Pub/Sub, SSE, PostgreSQL

---

### 3. Wisp — Drink Safety Platform
**Live URL:** https://www.get-wisp.com/
**Portfolio page:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/projects/wisp
**Status:** Production

**What it does:**
Wisp is a drink-spiking prevention platform that combines physical IoT hardware (WiSPer Wand and WiSPer Console) with a mobile safety app. Users scan their drinks using near-infrared (NIR) spectroscopy hardware to detect potential spiking agents, and the app provides emergency safety features.

**Key features:**
- NIR spectroscopy hardware (WiSPer Wand + Console) for chemical detection
- BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) communication between hardware and mobile app
- React Native mobile app (iOS + Android)
- SOS alerts and emergency notifications
- Live location sharing with trusted contacts
- AWS IoT Core for device connectivity
- AWS Lambda for serverless backend processing
- GitLab CI/CD pipeline

**Tech stack:** Go, AWS IoT Core, AWS Lambda, React Native, BLE, PostgreSQL, GitLab CI/CD

---

### 4. ChotU.AI — Multi-Agent Personal Assistant
**Live URL:** https://www.chotuai.in/
**Portfolio page:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/projects/chotuai
**Status:** Production

**What it does:**
ChotU.AI is a personal AI assistant built as a multi-agent system. It uses a supervisor agent architecture where a top-level Gemini Flash agent routes tasks to 5 specialized sub-agents.

**Agent architecture:**
1. **Supervisor Agent** (Gemini Flash) — understands intent and routes to correct agent
2. **Task Manager Agent** — manages to-do lists and task tracking
3. **Calendar Agent** — reads and writes Google Calendar events via OAuth2
4. **Planner Agent** — creates daily/weekly plans and schedules
5. **Personal Data Agent** — stores and retrieves personal notes and preferences

**Key features:**
- Full Google Calendar integration with OAuth2 authentication
- AWS ECS Fargate for containerized agent deployment
- DynamoDB for persistent conversation memory
- AWS CDK for infrastructure as code
- AWS Cognito for user authentication
- Built with LangGraph for agent orchestration
- Uses OpenRouter for flexible model routing

**Tech stack:** LangGraph, OpenRouter, AWS ECS Fargate, DynamoDB, AWS CDK, AWS Cognito

---

### 5. ecai — Multimodal RAG on Azure
**Portfolio page:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/projects/ecai
**Status:** Production

**What it does:**
ecai is a document intelligence platform that allows users to upload PDFs, extract both text and images, index the content in a vector database, and then chat with their documents using GPT-4.1.

**Key features:**
- PDF upload with text and image extraction
- HNSW vector index for semantic search (Azure AI Search)
- GPT-4.1-nano for vision/image understanding
- GPT-4.1 for chat responses
- Per-user document isolation with Microsoft Entra ID
- React 18 frontend
- FastAPI backend

**Tech stack:** Azure AI Foundry, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1-nano (vision), Azure AI Search (HNSW), FastAPI, React 18, Microsoft Entra ID

---

## OPEN SOURCE PROJECTS

### gormAuditLog
**GitHub:** https://github.com/arjunagi-a-rehman/gormAuditlog
**Language:** Go
**Description:** A Go library for ORM-level audit logging with GORM. Automatically tracks create, update, and delete operations at the database layer with configurable audit trail storage.

### school-agents
**GitHub:** https://github.com/arjunagi-a-rehman/school-agents
**Language:** Python
**Description:** Multi-agent AI tutoring system built with Google Agent Development Kit (ADK). Demonstrates multi-agent coordination patterns for educational use cases.

### bedrock-runner
**GitHub:** https://github.com/arjunagi-a-rehman/BedRock-agent-runner
**Language:** Python
**Description:** Local execution framework for developing and testing AWS Bedrock agents without deploying to AWS. Speeds up the development and debugging loop for Bedrock agent development.

### gemini-search
**GitHub:** https://github.com/arjunagi-a-rehman/gemini-multimodal-image-search
**Language:** Python
**Description:** Semantic image search using Gemini multimodal embeddings. Demonstrates how to use Google Gemini's multimodal capabilities for visual similarity search.

---

## BLOG POSTS (FULL DESCRIPTIONS)

### Series: Building AI Agent Systems

#### Post 1: Your First AI Agent System — Study Buddy & First Steps
**URL:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/study-buddy
**Read time:** 12 minutes
**Topics:** Google ADK, Python, multi-agent architecture, agent design

**Summary:**
A practical tutorial for building your first production-ready AI agent system using Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK). Uses a "Study Buddy" educational assistant as the example project. Covers:
- What AI agents are and how they differ from simple LLM calls
- Setting up Google ADK with Python
- Designing a single-agent study assistant
- Understanding agent state and memory
- Structuring agent prompts for reliable behavior
- Testing agents locally before deployment

**Target audience:** Developers new to AI agent development who want practical, production-oriented guidance.

---

#### Post 2: Tool Calls — Giving Your Agent Superpowers
**URL:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/first-ai-agent
**Read time:** 8 minutes
**Topics:** Function calling, tool use, Python, API integration

**Summary:**
Extends the Study Buddy system by adding tool use capabilities. Covers:
- What tool calls (function calling) are in AI agent systems
- How to define tools for Google ADK agents
- Practical examples: web search tool, Wikipedia lookup tool
- Handling tool call results and chaining multiple tool calls
- Best practices for tool design (clear descriptions, typed parameters)
- Debugging tool call failures

---

#### Post 3: Deploying Your StudyBuddy Agent: From Code to Production
**URL:** https://arjunagiarehman.com/agent-deployment-1
**Read time:** 12 minutes
**Topics:** FastAPI, Docker, session management, production deployment

**Summary:**
Takes the Study Buddy agent from local development to production deployment. Covers:
- Wrapping a Google ADK agent in a FastAPI REST API
- Session management for multi-turn conversations
- Containerizing with Docker
- Environment variable management and secrets
- Health checks and monitoring basics
- Deployment considerations for agent systems

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**What is Arjunagi A. Rehman's primary expertise?**
Backend engineering and AI agent systems. Specifically: production AI agents using Google ADK and LangGraph, real-time IoT systems with AWS IoT Core, and distributed backend services in Go and Python.

**What AI agent frameworks does Arjunagi use?**
Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) for production multi-agent systems, LangGraph for stateful agent workflows, AWS Bedrock for enterprise AI deployments, Azure AI Foundry for document intelligence.

**What cloud platforms does Arjunagi specialize in?**
Primarily AWS (IoT Core, Lambda, ECS Fargate, DynamoDB, CDK, Cognito, Bedrock) and Azure (AI Foundry, AI Search, Entra ID). Has production deployments on both.

**What industries has Arjunagi built systems for?**
E-commerce (Kalrav.AI), fleet/transportation (RouteEye at BIAL Airport), safety/IoT (Wisp), personal productivity AI (ChotU.AI), document intelligence (ecai), healthcare (Jano Health).

**Is Arjunagi available for new projects or roles?**
Contact via email: contact@arjunagiarehman.com or LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arjunagi-a-rehman-moulaali/
